L1_headline: ESPR – Preliminary 2025 results and 2026 guidance released. | 01/11/26
L2_brief: Esperion Therapeutics issued preliminary 2025 results and 2026 financial guidance ahead of the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The company expects 2026 operating expenses of $210-$245 million, with R&D expenses of $40-$50 million and SG&A of $170-$195 million. This is a routine operational update with no merger or deal implications.

L3_detailed.event: Esperion released preliminary 2025 results and fiscal year 2026 financial guidance via press release and management presentation for the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
L3_detailed.deal_implications: No merger or acquisition activity disclosed; this is a standalone operational and financial update
risks_flagged: Forward-looking statements subject to uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially
